productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Floral Print Blue Top
description: Composition Floral print top made of 100% cotton, with Nehru collar and buttoned chest placket, long sleeves, two buttoned flap pockets on the chest, lace detailing on the pocket flaps and chest placket, and has a curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Perfect on style and great in comfort, this floral top from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. The long sleeves create a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and ballerina shoes . Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height-5.8", Chest-33"
